report.summary: Cycle v11: No new commits (still at e999560, Mar 17 — 7 days stale). Git locks now 7.3 days old (P0). 674 uncommitted files (+4 since v10). All 6 API routes present with caching but 0/6 have rate limiting. 42 TS errors unchanged. No regressions — no code changes this cycle.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PUBLISHED SLUGS: 444 total (+4 since v10). 1,108 page.tsx files in src/app (+2 since v10).
MISSING PAGE.TSX: 103 published slugs rely on dynamic [slug] routes — unchanged.
TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors across 2 files: structured-data.examples.ts (JSX-in-TS syntax) and crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped JSX). Unchanged across all cycles.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true active in next.config.ts — Vercel builds succeed despite TS errors.
PUBLISH QUEUE: Empty — all planned pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
LINT: next lint script has path misconfiguration (resolves to /cryptodegen/lint). Non-blocking for Vercel.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: 0 commits this cycle, no new breakage introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices (swr=120s), trending (swr=600s), fear-greed (swr=1200s), market-metrics (swr=120s), market-dominance (swr=600s), defi-yields (s-maxage dynamic).
CACHE HEADERS: All 6 routes have stale-while-revalidate or s-maxage headers configured. No changes since Mar 14.
RATE LIMITER [P1]: 0/6 core public API routes have rate limiting (40+ cycles unfixed). Only cache-stats and health endpoints are rate-limited.
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK [P1]: 0 fallback data references in defi-yields/route.ts (40+ cycles unfixed). market-dominance has fallback (good).
LIVE API HEALTH: Cannot verify runtime from sandbox — egress blocked to degen0x.com. No code changes since last verified.
API ROUTE FILES: All untouched since Mar 12-14. No drift.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys in 7 days.
GIT LOCKS [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (created Mar 16 11:17, 7.3 days old) + .git/index.lock (created Mar 16 13:06, 7.1 days old). All commits and pushes blocked.
FIX COMMAND: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — single command, zero risk.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 674 uncommitted files (+4 since v10, +8 since v9). Drift continues accelerating.
NEXT.JS CONFIG: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true, trailingSlash=true.
0 commits today. 0 deploys today. Build cannot be tested in sandbox (OOM).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. +2 page.tsx files and +4 published slugs added in code but not committed.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git lock files — 7+ days old. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. Must be resolved before any commits or deploys. THIS IS THE #1 PRIORITY.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes (40+ cycles, needs Jefe attention).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields missing fallback data (40+ cycles, needs Jefe attention).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in 2 files need cleanup.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 published slugs without dedicated page.tsx files.
DELTA vs v10: +4 uncommitted files (670→674), +2 page.tsx files (1106→1108), +4 published slugs (440→444). Git locks still present.
RECOMMENDATION: Resolve git locks immediately, batch-commit 674 pending files, deploy to bring production current. 7-day commit gap is a significant risk.
